mapper.select:
SELECT fo.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` AS organizationId, fo.`з»„з»Үзј–з Ғ` AS organizationCode, fo.`з»„з»ҮеҗҚз§°` AS organizationName, fo.`жҸҸиҝ°` AS description, fo.`жҳҜеҗҰеҗҜз”Ё` AS enabled, fo.`еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ` AS createTime, fo.`жӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙ` AS updateTime, COALESCE(acc_stats.account_count, 0) AS accountCount, COALESCE(acc_stats.total_balance, '0.00') AS totalBalance, e1.`е‘ҳе·Ҙе§“еҗҚ` AS createUserName, e2.`е‘ҳе·Ҙе§“еҗҚ` AS updateUserName, fo.`еҲӣе»әдәәзј–з Ғ` AS creatorId FROM fund_organization fo LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e1 ON fo.`еҲӣе»әдәәзј–з Ғ` = e1.`е‘ҳе·Ҙзј–з Ғ` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e2 ON fo.`жӣҙж–°дәәзј–з Ғ` = e2.`е‘ҳе·Ҙзј–з Ғ` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fa.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` AS organization_id, COUNT(fa.`иҙҰжҲ·зј–еҸ·`) as account_count, '0.00' as total_balance FROM fund_account fa WHERE fa.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fa.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` ) acc_stats ON fo.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` = acc_stats.organization_id
AND fo.`з»„з»ҮеҗҚз§°` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.organizationName}, '%')
AND fo.`жҳҜеҗҰеҗҜз”Ё` = #{query.enabled}
AND fo.`еҲӣе»әдәәзј–з Ғ` = #{query.creatorFilter}
ORDER BY
fo.`з»„з»Үзј–з Ғ`
fo.`з»„з»ҮеҗҚз§°`
fo.`еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ`
fo.`жӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙ`
fo.`еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ`
ASC
DESC
ORDER BY fo.`еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ` DESC

SELECT fo.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` AS organizationId, fo.`з»„з»Үзј–з Ғ` AS organizationCode, fo.`з»„з»ҮеҗҚз§°` AS organizationName, fo.`жҸҸиҝ°` AS description, fo.`жҳҜеҗҰеҗҜз”Ё` AS enabled, fo.`еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ` AS createTime, fo.`жӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙ` AS updateTime, COALESCE(acc_stats.account_count, 0) AS accountCount, COALESCE(acc_stats.total_balance, '0.00') AS totalBalance, e1.`е‘ҳе·Ҙе§“еҗҚ` AS createUserName, e2.`е‘ҳе·Ҙе§“еҗҚ` AS updateUserName FROM fund_organization fo LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e1 ON fo.`еҲӣе»әдәәзј–з Ғ` = e1.`е‘ҳе·Ҙзј–з Ғ` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e2 ON fo.`жӣҙж–°дәәзј–з Ғ` = e2.`е‘ҳе·Ҙзј–з Ғ` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fa.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` AS organization_id, COUNT(fa.`иҙҰжҲ·зј–еҸ·`) as account_count, '0.00' as total_balance FROM fund_account fa WHERE fa.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fa.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` ) acc_stats ON fo.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` = acc_stats.organization_id WHERE fo.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` = #{organizationId}

SELECT fo.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` AS organization_id, fo.`з»„з»Үзј–з Ғ` AS organization_code, fo.`з»„з»ҮеҗҚз§°` AS organization_name, fo.`жҸҸиҝ°` AS description, fo.`жҳҜеҗҰеҗҜз”Ё` AS enabled, fo.`еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ` AS created_at, fo.`жӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙ` AS updated_at, fo.`еҲӣе»әдәәзј–з Ғ` AS create_user_id, fo.`жӣҙж–°дәәзј–з Ғ` AS update_user_id, fo.`version` AS version, COALESCE(account_stats.account_count, 0) AS accountCount FROM fund_organization fo LEFT JOIN ( SELECT `з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·`, COUNT(`иҙҰжҲ·зј–еҸ·`) as account_count FROM fund_account WHERE `з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` ) account_stats ON fo.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` = account_stats.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` WHERE fo.`жҳҜеҗҰеҗҜз”Ё` = true ORDER BY fo.`з»„з»ҮеҗҚз§°` ASC

SELECT fa.иҙҰжҲ·зј–еҸ· AS accountId, fa.иҙҰжҲ·зј–з Ғ AS accountCode, fa.иҙҰжҲ·еҗҚз§° AS accountName, fa.иҙҰжҲ·зұ»еһӢ AS accountType, fa.иҙҰжҲ·й“¶иЎҢиҙҰеҸ· AS accountBankAccount, fa.иҙҰжҲ·й“¶иЎҢжңәжһ„ AS accountBankInstitution, fa.жҳҜеҗҰеҗҜз”Ё AS enabled, fa.еӨҮжіЁ AS remark, fa.еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙ AS createTime, fa.жӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙ AS updateTime, e1.`е‘ҳе·Ҙе§“еҗҚ` AS createUserName, e2.`е‘ҳе·Ҙе§“еҗҚ` AS updateUserName FROM fund_account fa LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e1 ON fa.еҲӣе»әдәәзј–з Ғ = e1.`е‘ҳе·Ҙзј–з Ғ` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e2 ON fa.жӣҙж–°дәәзј–з Ғ = e2.`е‘ҳе·Ҙзј–з Ғ` WHERE fa.`з»„з»Үзј–еҸ·` = #{organizationId} ORDER BY fa.иҙҰжҲ·еҗҚз§° ASC
